work_iq_responses.query: Who has dealt with product return spikes or quality issues recently?

results.subject: RE: Vanilla Bean returns at Downtown — getting worse
results.snippet: Tom, we've had 6 more returns today for Vanilla Bean. All same complaint — grainy texture. This feels like the February cold chain issue again. Can you check if we got a new batch from the same distribution route? — Sarah

results.title: Vanilla Bean NE Return Spike
results.snippet: Pattern in Vanilla Bean returns concentrated in NE stores. Pulling batch records. @Maria Garcia — check Suburban Plaza numbers.

results.title: Weekly Ops Sync — March 10, 2026.docx
results.snippet: Tom flagged a potential quality issue with Vanilla Bean Classic at NE stores. Action: Tom to complete batch investigation by EOW. Sarah to track daily return counts at Downtown Flagship.

results.subject: FW: Lakeshore Dairy Co — Batch LOT-VB-2603 shipping confirmation
results.snippet: Confirming shipment of Batch LOT-VB-2603 to Northeast distribution center. Estimated delivery: March 3-4. Temperature-controlled transport via Route NE-7.
